title: The Seraphim Turn the Battlefield
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Sanji, Unknown person #7, Vegapunk, York, Marines, Unknown person #8 as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: In the history of the seas...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So is that the reason why they disbanded the seven warlords?!

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: WHAT IN THE WORLD HAVE YOU CREATED?!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: These guys are the Marines' weapons!

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: Yes. Basically, it's a threat to us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He's still trying to get up?
